findings.title: Outdated actix-web 3.3.3 with known security issues
findings.description: Actix-web 3.3.3 is unmaintained with known vulnerabilities; 4.x series includes critical security fixes

findings.title: Outdated serde 1.0.130 missing security patches
findings.description: Serde 1.0.130 is significantly behind current release with deserialization edge case fixes missing

findings.title: Outdated serde_json 1.0.68 with parsing edge cases
findings.description: serde_json 1.0.68 has known number parsing and deeply nested structure handling issues
